description: Pull today's calendar, research attendees, draft talking points, deliver brief.

brief.question: What meetings are on today's calendar? For each: time, attendees, topic/title, any prior email context with attendees.
For each attendee in today's meetings: what do we know about them? Check email history, Fireflies transcripts, memory, and LinkedIn. What did we last discuss? Any open items?

Based on the attendee research and meeting topics, draft 3-5 talking points per meeting. Include: what to ask, what to share, any commitments to reference, and one strategic angle the user might not have considered.
